name: keel-sec-guard
description: Hybrid SAST + Gemini LLM Security Reviewer for Agent & Developer PRs

scripts.build: tsc && esbuild src/action.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/action.js && esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/cli.js
